items.title: Drone footage shows huge Malaysian coastal village fire
items.dek: Thousands of people have been displaced after a fire destroyed around 1,000 homes in Malaysia's Sabah state.
items.body: Thousands of people have been displaced after a fire destroyed around 1,000 homes in Malaysia's Sabah state.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Thousands of Parisians evacuated as WW2 bomb detonated
items.dek: Residents within a 450m radius of the device were told to leave their homes while it was neutralised.
items.body: Residents within a 450m radius of the device were told to leave their homes while it was neutralised.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Why are gray whales dying in San Francisco's waters? US scientists search for clues
items.dek: Climate change and shifting migration patterns are bringing rare research opportunities and new mysteries.
items.body: Climate change and shifting migration patterns are bringing rare research opportunities and new mysteries.
items.author: IriLine Desk
